feed.title: Security Advisory for Go modules
feed.subtitle: Security Advisory for Go modules on GitHub

entry.title: [github.com/mattermost/mattermost-server] Mattermost Server has Insufficient Session Expiration when used as an OAuth 2.0 service provider
entry.content:
An issue was discovered in Mattermost Server before 4.0.0, 3.10.2, and 3.9.2, when used as an OAuth 2.0 service provider, Session invalidation was mishandled.

References

  • https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2017-18905
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/15ad24d160cb4604d0605ebbfa53d11a57820706
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/b17fca0d5ee7557e3df1cf1d1da8bd749859e35f
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/fbc170733e86f09b46ba754dd03304733d2f482f
  • https://mattermost.com/security-updates
  • https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-g24c-fx4v-xg9w

entry.title: [github.com/mattermost/mattermost-server] Mattermost Server has Insufficient Session Expiration when used as an OAuth 2.0 service provider
entry.content:
An issue was discovered in Mattermost Server before 4.0.0, 3.10.2, and 3.9.2, when used as an OAuth 2.0 service provider, Session invalidation was mishandled.

References

  • https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2017-18905
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/15ad24d160cb4604d0605ebbfa53d11a57820706

  • https://mattermost.com/security-updates
  • https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-g24c-fx4v-xg9w

entry.title: [github.com/mattermost/mattermost-server] Mattermost Server vulnerable to XSS via an uploaded file
entry.content:
An issue was discovered in Mattermost Server before 4.0.0, 3.10.2, and 3.9.2. It allows XSS via an uploaded file.

References

  • https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2017-18904
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/6a2754376c8c8270be5e11e3fdab589659d0cc8d
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/bde06a7bc3a03a56da224c1ffcd8bffb0af8071b
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/f06c5bef4d78966c60b153bbec6eea4ec0be9e68
  • https://mattermost.com/security-updates
  • https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8pff-p3gx-w4jf

entry.title: [github.com/mattermost/mattermost-server] Mattermost Server vulnerable to XSS via an uploaded file
entry.content:
An issue was discovered in Mattermost Server before 4.0.0, 3.10.2, and 3.9.2. It allows XSS via an uploaded file.

References

  • https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2017-18904
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/6a2754376c8c8270be5e11e3fdab589659d0cc8d
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/bde06a7bc3a03a56da224c1ffcd8bffb0af8071b

  • https://mattermost.com/security-updates
  • https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8pff-p3gx-w4jf

entry.title: [github.com/mattermost/mattermost-server] Mattermost Server vulnerable to CSRF if CORS is enabled
entry.content:
An issue was discovered in Mattermost Server before 4.0.0, 3.10.2, and 3.9.2. CSRF can occur if CORS is enabled.

References

  • https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2017-18903
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/312269ad0bd166174f07f9df7391fce714601600
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/4519b03d95e8bfe1b2f74094673ae1a2f39f6b47
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/a18479df0940be8503c9b88993490741793eba9e
  • https://mattermost.com/security-updates
  • https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fcwg-45jh-5qhf

entry.title: [github.com/mattermost/mattermost-server] Mattermost Server vulnerable to CSRF if CORS is enabled
entry.content:
An issue was discovered in Mattermost Server before 4.0.0, 3.10.2, and 3.9.2. CSRF can occur if CORS is enabled.

References

  • https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2017-18903
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/312269ad0bd166174f07f9df7391fce714601600
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/4519b03d95e8bfe1b2f74094673ae1a2f39f6b47
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/a18479df0940be8503c9b88993490741793eba9e
  • https://mattermost.com/security-updates
  • https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fcwg-45jh-5qhf

entry.title: [github.com/mattermost/mattermost-server] Mattermost Server exposes private team invite ID
entry.content:
An issue was discovered in Mattermost Server before 4.1.0, 4.0.4, and 3.10.3. It allows attackers to discover a team invite ID by requesting a JSON document.

References

  • https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2017-18901
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/5e822a7d09214d5446d54e02a0611df8e64f3aa5
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/638c38cc0d2296335a0fbd5bde8b6d2cbf9f9062
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/a78ed923f1c73ae5551893374fb9803ee2f4c8e6
  • https://mattermost.com/security-updates
  • https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c253-8hr4-r8v9

entry.title: [github.com/mattermost/mattermost-server] Mattermost Server exposes private team invite ID
entry.content:
An issue was discovered in Mattermost Server before 4.1.0, 4.0.4, and 3.10.3. It allows attackers to discover a team invite ID by requesting a JSON document.

References

  • https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2017-18901
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/5e822a7d09214d5446d54e02a0611df8e64f3aa5
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/638c38cc0d2296335a0fbd5bde8b6d2cbf9f9062
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/a78ed923f1c73ae5551893374fb9803ee2f4c8e6
  • https://mattermost.com/security-updates
  • https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c253-8hr4-r8v9

entry.title: [github.com/mattermost/mattermost-server] Mattermost Server is vulnerable CSV Injection
entry.content:
An issue was discovered in Mattermost Server before 4.0.4 and 3.10.3. It allows CSV injection via a compliance report.

References

  • https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2017-18900
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/eaa598aba901a20c65c52dd1e1b82e7e1dffb962
  • https://mattermost.com/security-updates
  • https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8q4v-35v6-g8wr

entry.title: [github.com/mattermost/mattermost-server] Mattermost Server is vulnerable CSV Injection
entry.content:
An issue was discovered in Mattermost Server before 4.0.4 and 3.10.3. It allows CSV injection via a compliance report.

References

  • https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2017-18900
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/eaa598aba901a20c65c52dd1e1b82e7e1dffb962
  • https://mattermost.com/security-updates
  • https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8q4v-35v6-g8wr

entry.title: [github.com/mattermost/mattermost-server] Mattermost Server is vulnerable to DoS through maliciously crafted posts
entry.content:
An issue was discovered in Mattermost Server before 4.2.0, 4.1.1, and 4.0.5. It allows crafted posts that potentially cause a web browser to hang.

References

  • https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2017-18898
  • https://github.com/grundleborg/mattermost/commit/5286318c72aa230f33f89df3b4cbdc33a0822a93
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/5bf6f06c02c368b9c73a8be2d2d8795b3405b22b
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/5c22176c963a7393241872073547f30083efe218
  • https://mattermost.com/security-updates
  • https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9589-mq83-f749

entry.title: [github.com/mattermost/mattermost-server] Mattermost Server is vulnerable to DoS through maliciously crafted posts
entry.content:
An issue was discovered in Mattermost Server before 4.2.0, 4.1.1, and 4.0.5. It allows crafted posts that potentially cause a web browser to hang.

References

  • https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2017-18898
  • https://github.com/grundleborg/mattermost/commit/5286318c72aa230f33f89df3b4cbdc33a0822a93
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/5bf6f06c02c368b9c73a8be2d2d8795b3405b22b

  • https://mattermost.com/security-updates
  • https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9589-mq83-f749

entry.title: [github.com/mattermost/mattermost-server] Mattermost Server is vulnerable to DoS through maliciously crafted posts
entry.content:
An issue was discovered in Mattermost Server before 4.2.0, 4.1.1, and 4.0.5. It allows crafted posts that potentially cause a web browser to hang.

References

  • https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2017-18898
  • https://github.com/grundleborg/mattermost/commit/5286318c72aa230f33f89df3b4cbdc33a0822a93

entry.title: [github.com/mattermost/mattermost-server] Mattermost Server allows attackers to log sensitive information via DEBUG REST API logging endpoint
entry.content:
An issue was discovered in Mattermost Server before 4.2.0, 4.1.1, and 4.0.5. It allows attackers to add DEBUG lines to the logs via a REST API version 3 logging endpoint.

References

  • https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2017-18896
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/3c34e2b2dcb0fde96a10e68d877aa7d0ab511669
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/722fb1947a2e7395ccf16adce9206736d803a9f3
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/d38328976e2c8bb0fab91e656042a0d8ac37bc76
  • https://mattermost.com/security-updates
  • https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-63wg-qmrv-7q66

entry.title: [github.com/mattermost/mattermost-server] Mattermost Server allows attackers to log sensitive information via DEBUG REST API logging endpoint
entry.content:
An issue was discovered in Mattermost Server before 4.2.0, 4.1.1, and 4.0.5. It allows attackers to add DEBUG lines to the logs via a REST API version 3 logging endpoint.

References

  • https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2017-18896
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/3c34e2b2dcb0fde96a10e68d877aa7d0ab511669

  • https://mattermost.com/security-updates
  • https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-63wg-qmrv-7q66

entry.title: [github.com/mattermost/mattermost-server] Mattermost Server allows attackers to log sensitive information via DEBUG REST API logging endpoint
entry.content:
An issue was discovered in Mattermost Server before 4.2.0, 4.1.1, and 4.0.5. It allows attackers to add DEBUG lines to the logs via a REST API version 3 logging endpoint.

References

  • https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2017-18896
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/3c34e2b2dcb0fde96a10e68d877aa7d0ab511669

  • https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-63wg-qmrv-7q66

entry.title: [github.com/mattermost/mattermost-server] Mattermost Server mishandles redirect denial action
entry.content:
An issue was discovered in Mattermost Server before 4.2.0, 4.1.1, and 4.0.5, when used as an OAuth 2.0 service provider. It mishandles a deny action for a redirection.

References

  • https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2017-18897
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/3c34e2b2dcb0fde96a10e68d877aa7d0ab511669
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/722fb1947a2e7395ccf16adce9206736d803a9f3
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/d38328976e2c8bb0fab91e656042a0d8ac37bc76
  • https://mattermost.com/security-updates
  • https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f7c3-7vp3-44p6

entry.title: [github.com/mattermost/mattermost-server] Mattermost Server mishandles redirect denial action
entry.content:
An issue was discovered in Mattermost Server before 4.2.0, 4.1.1, and 4.0.5, when used as an OAuth 2.0 service provider. It mishandles a deny action for a redirection.

References

  • https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2017-18897
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/3c34e2b2dcb0fde96a10e68d877aa7d0ab511669
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/722fb1947a2e7395ccf16adce9206736d803a9f3
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/d38328976e2c8bb0fab91e656042a0d8ac37bc76
  • https://mattermost.com/security-updates
  • https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f7c3-7vp3-44p6

entry.title: [github.com/mattermost/mattermost-server] Mattermost Server mishandles redirect denial action
entry.content:
An issue was discovered in Mattermost Server before 4.2.0, 4.1.1, and 4.0.5, when used as an OAuth 2.0 service provider. It mishandles a deny action for a redirection.

References

  • https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2017-18897
  • https://github.com/mattermost/mattermost/commit/3c34e2b2dcb0fde96a10e68d877aa7d0ab511669

  • https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f7c3-7vp3-44p6

entry.title: [github.com/mattermost/mattermost-server] Mattermost Server has intermittent Authorization bypass for resource-owners
entry.content:
An issue was discovered in Mattermost Server before 4.2.0, 4.1.1, and 4.0.5, when used as an OAuth 2.0 service provider. Resource-owner authorization can be intermittently bypassed, allowing account takeover.

References

  • https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2017-18894
  • https://mattermost.com/security-updates
  • https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gg42-mwr6-p82c
